_meta.purpose: Hand-curated commander combo database. Supplements (does not replace) Commander Spellbook's API — Spellbook tracks the canonical 2-card lines but misses some 3-card setups, persist-loops, and commander-specific synergies.
policy: Each entry lists `pieces` = required cards in deck. Optional `commanderRequired` if the line only works with that commander in play.
All-pieces present in the deck = `in_deck`. All-but-one = `almost_in_deck` with the missing piece called out.
`result` is short factual text — what the combo produces. Avoid copying Spellbook's step-by-step descriptions verbatim.
Add new entries here when users surface specific commander combos the analyzer misses.

combos.name: Thassa's Oracle + Demonic Consultation
combos.result: Win the game (exile library, then Thoracle ETB)

combos.name: Thassa's Oracle + Tainted Pact
combos.result: Win the game (exile library, then Thoracle ETB)

combos.name: Thassa's Oracle + Jace, Wielder of Mysteries
combos.result: Library-out wincon redundancy

combos.name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + Triskelion
combos.result: Infinite damage to any target

combos.name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + Walking Ballista
combos.result: Infinite damage (with sac outlet, see Phyrexian Altar combo)

combos.name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Zealous Conscripts
combos.result: Infinite hasty creatures

combos.name: Kiki-Jiki, Mirror Breaker + Pestermite
combos.result: Infinite hasty Pestermites; tap-down loop

combos.name: Splinter Twin + Pestermite
combos.result: Infinite hasty creatures

combos.name: Heliod, Sun-Crowned + Walking Ballista
combos.result: Infinite damage with lifelink counters

combos.name: Exquisite Blood + Sanguine Bond
combos.result: Infinite drain — first life-loss wins the game

combos.name: Exquisite Blood + Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
pieces: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose
combos.result: Infinite drain — same engine as Sanguine Bond version

combos.name: Isochron Scepter + Dramatic Reversal
combos.result: Infinite mana from non-land sources (rocks, dorks)
combos.synergyHint: needs >=3 mana from non-land sources for net positive mana

combos.name: Deadeye Navigator + Peregrine Drake
combos.result: Infinite blue/blink mana

combos.name: Palinchron + any way to untap (Phantasmal Image, Deadeye)
combos.result: Infinite mana with untap-target loops

combos.name: Worldgorger Dragon + Animate Dead (or Necromancy / Dance of the Dead)
combos.result: Infinite mana, infinite ETB triggers

combos.name: Worldgorger Dragon + Necromancy
combos.result: Infinite mana, infinite ETB triggers

combos.name: Godo, Bandit Warlord + Helm of the Host
combos.result: Infinite combat steps; lethal commander damage

combos.name: Phyrexian Altar + persist creature + Aristocrats payoff
combos.result: Infinite sac triggers (with payoff like Zulaport Cutthroat = win)

combos.name: Ashnod's Altar + persist creature + Aristocrats payoff
combos.result: Infinite mana + death triggers

combos.name: Meren of Clan Nel Toth + Phyrexian Altar + Reassembling Skeleton
combos.result: Infinite sac/return loop on Meren's experience counters

combos.name: Yawgmoth, Thran Physician + 2 undying creatures
combos.result: Infinite drain on Yawgmoth's death-trigger draws

combos.name: Yawgmoth, Thran Physician + Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + any other creature
combos.result: Infinite drain via Mike's undying granted to a sac target

combos.name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed + sac outlet + any creature without +1/+1 counters
combos.result: Infinite sacrifices via undying

combos.name: Krark, the Thumbless + Sakashima of a Thousand Faces
combos.result: Infinite spell copies on coinflip wins (storm)

combos.name: The Scarab God + repeated zombie tokens
combos.result: Infinite scry and creature copies

combos.name: Korvold, Fae-Cursed King + Phyrexian Altar + persist creature
combos.result: Infinite draw and mana

combos.name: Thassa, Deep-Dwelling + ETB creature value
combos.result: Repeated ETB triggers each end step

combos.name: Approach of the Second Sun (cast twice)
combos.result: Wins the game on second cast (alt-win)

combos.name: Doomsday + Thassa's Oracle
combos.result: Doomsday pile sets up next-turn Thoracle win

combos.name: Underworld Breach + Brain Freeze + Lion's Eye Diamond
combos.result: Mill all opponents (storm)

combos.name: Necropotence + repeatable life gain
combos.result: Effectively draw your deck

combos.result: Infinite creature mana

combos.name: Paradox Engine effects (replaced by Isochron+Reversal in modern lists)
combos.result: Infinite mana into draw / win pieces

combos.name: Consecrated Sphinx + Rhystic Study (just very strong; not infinite)

combos.name: Dockside Extortionist + repeatable bounce
combos.result: Infinite Treasure (when ≥2 artifacts/enchantments on opponents)
